description: This is a distressed gray wooden dresser with a changing pad on top. The dresser has four drawers, with the top two drawers being smaller and side-by-side, and the bottom two drawers being larger and stacked vertically. Each drawer has a simple black knob. The wood has a rustic, weathered appearance, suggesting a vintage or farmhouse style. The changing pad on top is white with a subtle pattern of green leaves. The overall design is practical and suitable for a nursery or child's room, combining storage with a functional changing surface.
